name: Centrifugal Pump - Model CP-500
description: High-efficiency centrifugal pump submittal for HVAC chilled water system
pdf_content:
SUBMITTAL SHEET
Project: Central Plant Upgrade
Equipment: Centrifugal Pump

MANUFACTURER: FlowTech Industries
MODEL: CP-500
TYPE: End-suction centrifugal pump

DESIGN SPECIFICATIONS:
- Flow Rate: 500 GPM @ 75 ft head
- Motor: 20 HP, 1750 RPM, 460V/3PH/60Hz
- Efficiency: 82% at design point
- Impeller Diameter: 10.5 inches
- NPSH Required: 12 ft
- Maximum Operating Pressure: 175 PSI
- Operating Temperature Range: 40°F to 200°F
- Pump Casing: Cast iron with epoxy coating
- Mechanical Seal: Carbon/ceramic, EPDM elastomers
- Shaft: 316 stainless steel

TESTING & COMMISSIONING REQUIREMENTS:
1. Verify pump rotation direction before operation
2. Check alignment between pump and motor
3. Measure and record vibration levels at design flow
4. Verify flow rate using calibrated flow meter
5. Check pressure differential across pump
6. Verify motor current draw is within nameplate FLA
7. Test variable frequency drive (if applicable) through full speed range
8. Document all test results in commissioning report

SUBMITTED BY: John Smith, PE
DATE: 2024-01-15
PAGE: 1 of 2
